## ASLF Checklist (if this PR touches scripts, matchmaker, `lib/`, `data/`, or `supabase-web/`)

- [ ] I reviewed [`docs/aslf/REGRESSION_MEMORY.md`](docs/aslf/REGRESSION_MEMORY.md) (skim).

- [ ] I updated ASLF regression memory if this fixes a user-visible or tooling regression.
